questions.text: What is the force between two small charged spheres having charges of 2 × 10⁻⁷ C and 3 × 10⁻⁷ C placed 30 cm apart in air?

The electrostatic force on a small sphere of charge 0.4 μC due to another small sphere of charge −0.8 μC in air is 0.2 N. (a) What is the distance between the two spheres? (b) What is the force on the second sphere due to the first?
Check that the ratio ke²/Gme mp is dimensionless. Look up a Table of Physical Constants and determine the value of this ratio. What does the ratio signify?
